signals.title: [rch] Add project sync hygiene for generated artifacts and retrieval stalls
signals.reopen_reason: Reopened: Reopened by LavenderGate on 2026-05-07: RCH artifact retrieval still stalls after successful remote cargo work. Repro command: rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch_target_eidetic_preflight_core cargo test -p ee --test contracts preflight_tripwires. Remote test reported 9/9 passed and began retrieving .rch-target artifacts, then produced no output for several minutes. This contradicts the closeout claim that retrieval stalls were resolved and remains relevant to eidetic_engine_cli-6wj5 full verification. I terminated the stuck local wrapper/rsync PIDs after recording the remote success; future attempts should prefer rch queue/cancel per the 15po guidance.
